name: Voltrac Moto 2W Lite
tagline: Compact LFP Traction Pack for Commuter E-Scooters
description: Voltrac Moto 2W Lite is a high-density Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery pack designed for commuter electric scooters and delivery e-bikes. Engineered with custom structural cell isolation and thermal shock resistance, it provides steady torque, long service life, and unmatched safety on hot city streets.
features: Full compliance with latest AIS 156 Phase 2 thermal safety directives
IP67 dust and water-tight pressure-cast aluminum containment case
Integrated smart BMS with cell-level balancing and over-current prevention
Thermal containment barriers prevent flame propagation between cell matrices
Supports standard charging profile restoring 100% capacity in 3 hours

name: Voltrac Moto 2W Pro
tagline: High-Torque EV Battery for Performance & Fleet E-Scooters
description: The Voltrac Moto 2W Pro is an advanced, high-performance battery pack built for high-speed electric scooters and heavy-duty delivery fleets. Leveraging high-discharge LFP cells and active cooling configurations, it yields impressive acceleration rates, extended range capabilities, and maximum operational uptime.
features: AIS 156 certified dual pressure relief valves for safety venting
CAN 2.0B communication protocol interface for telematics integration
Smart micro-BMS tracks individual cell temperature and state-of-health
IP67 cast metal enclosure with shock-absorbing structural structural ribs
Supports 1.5C rapid charging configurations

name: Voltrac Rickshaw LFP 48V
tagline: Heavy-Duty Battery Pack for Passenger E-Rickshaws
description: Designed specifically for passenger e-rickshaws, the Voltrac Rickshaw LFP 48V provides double the usable life of standard lead-acid packs. It features exceptional deep discharge stability and thermal cooling fins, allowing operators to run double shifts without mid-day thermal throttling.
features: Specifically tuned for last-mile public transit operations in high ambient heat
Dual pressure-vent safety system with flame barrier inserts
BMS integration with standard rickshaw speed controllers and dashboard meters
Heavy gauge steel construction protects against severe under-carriage impacts
High efficiency cooling fins for passive thermal dissipation

name: Voltrac Rickshaw Cargo
tagline: Ultra-Capacity Traction Pack for Commercial E-Loaders
description: The Voltrac Rickshaw Cargo is a premium, high-capacity battery system engineered to haul heavy payloads in commercial three-wheeler cargo loaders. Utilizing Grade-A LFP chemistry and robust cell-linking matrices, it provides the torque required for steep climbs and high cargo mileage.
features: Grade-A prismatic LiFePO4 cells with structural anti-vibration framing
State-of-health tracking compatible with modern GPS fleet telematics
Deep discharge capacity (95% DOD) without voltage sag under full payload
Inbuilt short-circuit, over-charge, and temperature cut-off safety circuits
Rugged metal handles and heavy-duty terminal posts for secure installation

name: Voltrac TurfMaster 48V
tagline: Deep-Cycle LFP Power for Premium Electric Golf Carts
description: Voltrac TurfMaster 48V is a direct drop-in replacement for lead-acid battery banks in electric golf carts. Weighing less than a third of equivalent lead-acid strings, it dramatically reduces cart weight, increases speeds, protects green turf, and delivers zero-maintenance reliable power.
features: Drop-in replacement for standard 48V golf cart battery bays
Dramatically improves vehicle efficiency and reduces wear on tires and brakes
Integrated Bluetooth BMS for battery health monitoring via mobile app
Maintenance-free design (no watering, acid leaks, or corrosion cleanup)
Fast charging allows full recharges between course rounds

name: Voltrac TurfMaster 36V
tagline: Deep-Cycle LFP Battery for Classic Utility Carts
description: The Voltrac TurfMaster 36V provides high-capacity, deep-cycle lithium power for classic utility carts and industrial towing tugs. Its high capacity allows resort and commercial park operators to complete full-day shifts without intermediate charges.
features: High capacity LFP cell structure with excellent energy density
Maintenance-free operation eliminates the need for acid refills
Onboard temperature monitoring protects cell health during hot summer days
High cycle count ensures 10+ years of active utility service
Drop-in form factor fits traditional 36V vehicle compartments

name: Voltrac Forklift Pro 80V
tagline: Heavy-Duty Traction LFP Pack for Industrial Forklifts
description: Voltrac Forklift Pro 80V is a powerhouse traction battery for heavy-duty industrial forklifts, reach trucks, and warehouse stackers. Built to replace heavy lead-acid industrial blocks, it supports opportunity charging (charging during breaks) without memory degradation, offering 24/7 warehouse uptime.
features: Supports rapid opportunity charging - top up 20% during coffee breaks
Massive lifecycle (4000+ charge cycles) with zero capacity degradation
Industrial CAN-bus interface integrates with warehouse fleet management systems
No acid fumes, ventilation bays, or battery exchange rooms required
Triple-layer safety system with integrated contactors and pressure venting

name: Voltrac Stacker LFP 24V
tagline: Compact Traction Module for Pallet Stackers & Jacks
description: The Voltrac Stacker LFP 24V is a rugged, compact traction battery module specifically engineered for electric pallet jacks, stackers, and Order Pickers. Its compact design fits standard OEM compartments, enabling easy upgrade transitions to high-efficiency lithium power.
features: OEM drop-in replacement dimensions for leading pallet jack brands
Excellent vibration resistance, perfect for dock-crossing and rough floors
Fast charging capability restores full power in under 2 hours
State-of-charge LED display mounted on battery face
Smart BMS prevents deep discharge damage from heavy loading cycles

name: Voltrac ChargePack 2W
tagline: Smart High-Frequency Charger for E-Scooters & E-Bikes
description: Voltrac ChargePack 2W is a smart, high-frequency lithium charger designed specifically for electric two-wheelers. Armed with an advanced microchip controller, it automatically detects pack voltage (60V or 72V) and applies a optimized CC/CV charging profile to maximize cell lifespan.
features: Auto-detects battery state-of-charge and regulates charging rates
Active cooling fan with quiet noise-controlled operation
Rugged aluminum housing with IP54 ingress protection rating
Built-in protection against over-voltage, short-circuit, and reverse polarity
LED charging progress indicators (Red: Charging, Green: Complete)

name: Voltrac ChargePack 3W
description: The Voltrac ChargePack 3W is a ruggedized, high-speed charger built for commercial electric three-wheelers and passenger e-rickshaws. With a high charging current of 20A and an IP55 weatherproof enclosure, it can be mounted outdoors in charging stations to restore battery levels rapidly.
features: Heavy-duty fast charge profile (fully charges 100Ah pack in 5 hours)
IP55 weather protection, ideal for outdoor fleet charging stations
High power factor correction (PFC) reduces grid energy consumption by 8%
Bright LED display showing real-time charging current and output voltage
Thermal reduction circuitry prevents charger overheating in tropical climates

name: Voltrac Custom Traction Pack
tagline: Tailored LFP / NMC Battery packs for Bespoke EV Projects
description: Voltrac Custom Traction Packs are engineered systems designed for specialized electric vehicle applications including electric boats, utility tractors, airport ground support equipment, and customized industrial vehicle conversions. Our team designs, builds, and tests packs utilizing 3D CAD modeling and advanced thermal simulation to fit your specifications.
features: Custom voltage configurations from 24V up to 400V high-voltage lines
Custom capacity matching and modular cell stacking geometries
Choice of cell chemistry: High-safety LFP or Ultra-dense NMC based on footprint
Customized BMS firmware with CAN, Modbus, or custom serial bus integrations
3D mechanical casing modeling, drop tests, and thermal safety certifications

specifications.label: Waterproof Class
specifications.value: Up to IP67 depending on request

applications: Electric boats and marine propulsion packs
